MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-17-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SERVICE SCAFFOLD CO., INC., ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT SURROUNDING CAUSATION THROUGH CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE PROFERRED BY PERCIPIENT WITNESS AND PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT WITNESS PHETTEPLACE. COURT RULED ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE RE DECLARATION OF STEVEN PHETTEPLACE, OVERRULED IN PART & SUSTAINED IN PART. ORDER ON OBJECTIONS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER ON MOTION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; COURT REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

Off Calendar Feb-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SERVICE SCAFFOLD CO., INC., ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Jordan A. Sussman, Esq. of Zief, Diment & Glickman 986-3644 for pltfs & opposing parties; Jeff M. Fackler, Esq. of Michel & Fackler 925/933-7309 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT SURROUNDING CAUSATION THROUGH CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE PROFERRED BY PERCIPIENT WITNESS AND PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT WITNESS PHETTEPLACE. Court ruled on defendant's objections to evidence re declaration of Steven Phetteplace, overruled in part & sustained in part. Order on objections signed in open court. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order on motion. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
